src/flit/platform/file_picker

  • Index
Search:
Group by:
  • Types
    • FileFilter
  • Vars
    • openFileImpl
    • pickFolderImpl
    • saveFileImpl
  • Procs
        openFile
      • openFile(title: string = "Open file"; filters: seq[FileFilter] = @[]): string
        pickFolder
      • pickFolder(title: string = "Choose folder"): string
        saveFile
      • saveFile(title: string = "Save file"; defaultName: string = "untitled"): string

Native file picker dialogs. openFile, saveFile, pickFolder each spawn the OS-native picker and return the selected path (or empty string if the user cancelled).

Implementation strategy: shell out to a platform helper instead of binding to per-OS GUI frameworks. This trades a small fork overhead for zero native binding code:

  • macOS: osascript with AppleScript file-picker
  • Linux: zenity (GNOME) or kdialog (KDE), whichever is on PATH
  • Windows: PowerShell with System.Windows.Forms.OpenFileDialog
  • Web: not implemented; use <input type=file> directly

Procs block until the user dismisses the picker.

Types

FileFilter = object
  name*: string
  exts*: seq[string]
A name + extension list for filtering the picker. Example: FileFilter(name: "Images", exts: @["png", "jpg"])

Vars

openFileImpl: proc (title: string; filters: seq[FileFilter]): string {.closure.} = proc (
    title: string; filters: seq[FileFilter]): string = result = ""
Backend used by openFile. Swap in tests to return a fake path without spawning a real OS picker. The platform-specific default is installed at module load time. 
pickFolderImpl: proc (title: string): string {.closure.} = proc (title: string): string = result = ""
Backend used by pickFolder. Swap in tests. The platform-specific default is installed at module load time. 
saveFileImpl: proc (title, defaultName: string): string {.closure.} = proc (
    title, defaultName: string): string = result = ""
Backend used by saveFile. Swap in tests. The platform-specific default is installed at module load time.

Procs

proc openFile(title: string = "Open file"; filters: seq[FileFilter] = @[]): string {.
    ...raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Opens a native file-open dialog. Returns the absolute path of the selected file, or empty string if the user cancelled. Blocks until the dialog is dismissed. 
proc pickFolder(title: string = "Choose folder"): string {....raises: [Exception],
    tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Opens a native folder-picker dialog. Returns the chosen directory path, or empty string if cancelled. 
proc saveFile(title: string = "Save file"; defaultName: string = "untitled"): string {.
    ...raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
Opens a native file-save dialog. Returns the chosen path, or empty string if cancelled.
